allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; docker images --format 'table {{.Repository}}\\t{{.Tag}}' 2>/dev/null | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker exec nginx-proxy-manager ls /data/nginx/ 2>&1 && docker exec nginx-proxy-manager ls /data/nginx/proxy_host/ 2>&1 | head -20")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker exec nginx-proxy-manager cat /etc/nginx/conf.d/include/proxy.conf")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker exec nginx-proxy-manager nginx -v 2>&1")
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker exec nginx-proxy-manager find /data -name '*.db' 2>/dev/null")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no dieter@192.168.68.115 "docker exec nginx-proxy-manager find /data -name 'database*' -o -name '*.sqlite' 2>/dev/null; ls /data 2>/dev/null || docker exec nginx-proxy-manager ls /data/")
